elements.title: lang::report_page_029_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ra.id,
       kbi_c.id                                                               AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                         AS course_name,
       kbi_c.timecreated                                                      AS course_created,
       kbi_u.id                                                               AS teacher_id,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.picture                                                          AS teacher_picture,
       kbi_u.firstnamephonetic                                                AS teacher_firstnamephonetic,
       kbi_u.lastnamephonetic                                                 AS teacher_lastnamephonetic,
       kbi_u.middlename                                                       AS teacher_middlename,
       kbi_u.alternatename                                                    AS teacher_alternatename,
       kbi_u.imagealt                                                         AS teacher_imagealt,
       (SELECT COUNT(distinct kbi_ras.userid)
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ras, mdl_context kbi_con
        WHERE kbi_con.id = kbi_ras.contextid
          AND kbi_con.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_ras.roleid = 5
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id)                                      AS enrolled_students,
       (SELECT COUNT(kbi_ass.id) FROM mdl_assign kbi_ass WHERE kbi_ass.course = kbi_c.id) AS assignments,
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_sub.id)
        FROM mdl_assign_submission kbi_sub
               LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_as_grade
                 ON kbi_as_grade.userid = kbi_sub.userid AND kbi_as_grade.assignment = kbi_sub.assignment AND
                    kbi_as_grade.attemptnumber = kbi_sub.attemptnumber
               JOIN mdl_assign kbi_ass ON kbi_ass.id = kbi_sub.assignment
        WHERE kbi_sub.status = 'submitted'
          AND kbi_sub.latest = 1
          AND kbi_sub.timecreated > (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() - 2592000)
          AND (kbi_as_grade.grade IS NULL OR kbi_as_grade.grade < 0)
          AND kbi_ass.course = kbi_c.id)                                          AS needs_grading,
       (SELECT AVG(kbi_as_grade.timecreated - kbi_sub.timecreated)
        FROM mdl_assign_submission kbi_sub
               LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_as_grade
                 ON kbi_as_grade.userid = kbi_sub.userid AND kbi_as_grade.assignment = kbi_sub.assignment AND
                    kbi_as_grade.attemptnumber = kbi_sub.attemptnumber
               JOIN mdl_assign kbi_ass ON kbi_ass.id = kbi_sub.assignment
        WHERE kbi_sub.status = 'submitted'
          AND kbi_sub.latest = 1
          AND kbi_as_grade.grade IS NOT NULL
          AND kbi_as_grade.grade >= 0
          AND kbi_ass.course = kbi_c.id)                                          AS avg_time_to_grade,
       (SELECT SUM(kbi_lil.visits) / COUNT(DISTINCT timepoint)
        FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit, mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_lil
        WHERE kbi_lil.trackid = kbi_lit.id
          AND kbi_lit.courseid = kbi_c.id)                                        AS logins_by_teacher,
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fd.id)
        FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd, mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp
        WHERE kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
          AND kbi_fd.course = kbi_c.id)                                           AS teacher_discussions,
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp.id)
        FROM mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd, mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp
        WHERE kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
          AND kbi_fd.course = kbi_c.id)                                           AS teacher_posts,
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_fp.id)
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ras, mdl_context kbi_con, mdl_forum_discussions kbi_fd, mdl_forum_posts kbi_fp
        WHERE kbi_con.id = kbi_ras.contextid
          AND kbi_ras.roleid = 5
          AND kbi_con.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_fp.discussion = kbi_fd.id
          AND kbi_fd.course = kbi_con.instanceid
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id)                                      AS students_posts,
       (SELECT COUNT(distinct id) FROM mdl_event WHERE userid = kbi_u.id)     AS teacher_events,
       (SELECT COUNT(distinct kbi_e.id)
        FROM mdl_event kbi_e, mdl_role_assignments kbi_ras, mdl_context kbi_con
        WHERE kbi_ras.userid = kbi_e.userid
          AND kbi_ras.roleid = 5
          AND kbi_con.id = kbi_ras.contextid
          AND kbi_con.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_e.courseid = kbi_con.instanceid
          AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id)                                      AS students_events,
       (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM mdl_course_modules WHERE course = kbi_c.id)     AS added_course_module
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
WHERE kbi_ra.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
